shadows.name: tactile-lift
shadows.purpose: Applied to interactive elements on hover.

shadows.name: sticker-shadow
shadows.purpose: Signature offset shadow for decorative graphics.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Standard easing for buttery smooth transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call to action. Energetic and pill-shaped.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #E9552E; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; border: none; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background-color: #D14421; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.08); }

components.name: Process Card
components.html:
1. Discovery

A 30-min call to understand your business goals and competitive landscape.
components.css: .ds-card-process { background-color: #FFFBF7; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card-process:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); } .ds-card-process h3 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; color: #443E38; } .ds-card-process p { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #7A726A; margin: 0; }

components.name: Featured Pricing Card
components.description: Highlighted pricing plan with brand border and badge.
components.html:
Most Popular

Growth

₹85,000

For established businesses.
components.css: .ds-pricing-featured { background: white; border: 2px solid #E9552E; border-radius: 24px; padding: 48px; position: relative; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(233, 85, 46, 0.1); } .ds-badge { position: absolute; top: -15px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: #E9552E; color: white; padding: 8px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; } .ds-pricing-featured h3 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; color: #443E38; } .ds-price { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #E9552E; margin-bottom: 16px; line-height: 1; } .ds-pricing-featured p { color: #7A726A; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Nexora Labs embraces an aesthetic philosophy of simplicity, speed, and creativity, aiming to make even the most ordinary projects visually compelling. Their work is defined by clean, modern design choices that feel fresh and approachable. By balancing quick delivery with high-quality craftsmanship, they ensure clients get designs that are both efficient and impactful.
keyCharacteristics: Typographic Authority with bold geometric sans

rules.name: The 10% Pop Rule
rules.body: The primary orange is a high-chroma tool meant for impact. Use it on ≤10% of the interface.

rules.name: Flat at Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are clean and flat by default. Depth is conveyed through bold tonal layering.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color declarations.
Do wrap body text at 65ch for legibility.
Do use the 'Sticker Shadow' for decorative graphics.
donts: Don't use generic 'AI SLOP' generated assets.
Don't use standard SaaS blue or cold greys.
Don't use glassmorphism or overly blurred shadows.
